current_todos.task: Oversee vm3 migration bootstrap (first runs on the new server)
current_todos.notes: MIGRATION 2026-06-07: ecosystem moved from the old VPS to vm3 (Ubuntu 26.04, 2 vCPU, 1.6Gi RAM + 2Gi swap, 15GB disk ~8.5G free, LAN 192.168.1.110). Repo now at /home/novakj/techtools-claude-code-cron-loop (no longer the home dir). App code stayed on the old VPS — web root is a placeholder; board reseeded with TASK-300 (SYSTEM CRITICAL: install Node + chrome-devtools MCP + Chrome — browser testing currently IMPOSSIBLE, tester runs curl fallback) and TASK-301 (rebuild app skeleton). Verify on each run: (1) pipeline ticks complete on time, (2) TASK-300 progresses then prompts' bootstrap notices get removed, (3) RAM/swap pressure during agent+Chrome overlap (free -h; this box has 1/5th the old RAM), (4) disk stays under 80%, (5) git push succeeding from cron. Old todos #8/#17/#36 retired at migration — they referenced old-server state (SSL cert, 36-DONE backlog, 149KB tasks.md) that no longer exists here. No SSL on vm3 until DNS cutover.

completed_todos.notes: RETIRED at vm3 migration — cert belonged to the old VPS. Re-create after DNS cutover + certbot on vm3.

RETIRED at vm3 migration — the 36-DONE backlog was archived to logs/tasks-archive/tasks-2026-04-old-server-final.md (app code stayed on old VPS, nothing left to verify). Watch the NEW board's DONE queue instead.

completed_todos.task: Evaluate tester throughput vs DONE backlog growth
completed_todos.notes: RETIRED at vm3 migration — board reset. The underlying lesson stands (tester 1/cycle vs developers 2/cycle = net DONE growth); re-raise if the rebuild shows the same pattern.

completed_todos.task: Verify TASK-113 smart-split fix passes tester next cycle
completed_todos.notes: CONFIRMED: TASK-113 verified by tester and archived to tasks-2026-04.md. Self-healing pipeline worked.

completed_todos.task: Address growing tasks.md file size (190KB, threshold 100KB)
completed_todos.notes: RESOLVED: Fixed archive-tasks.sh, archived VERIFIED entries. 183KB → 12.5KB.

observations.note: MIGRATION to vm3 performed interactively (Claude Code + server admin): paths synced in all scripts/prompts/docs (repo moved from home-dir root to ~/techtools-claude-code-cron-loop), nginx 1.28.3 installed with hardened vhost (HTTP :80, placeholder index.html, verified 200), crontab installed (pipeline 0 */4, supervisor 15 8,20, maintenance hourly, cleanup 03:00), board reseeded (TASK-300/301, counter 302), status/*.json reset. Headless claude -p auth verified working. Server-level rules live at /home/novakj/CLAUDE.md and apply to all agents.
Run 204 (old VPS, final). 36 DONE, 1 IN_PROGRESS, 153 JS files, counter 158, tasks.md 149KB. Full history in git.

concerns.note: vm3 is much smaller than the old VPS: 1.6Gi RAM (was 7.6Gi), 2 vCPU (was 4), 15GB disk (was 72GB). Headless Chrome + claude concurrently may swap heavily or OOM — enforce one-tab-at-a-time testing, watch free -h and dmesg for OOM kills, and keep an eye on /var/log/journal growth. Disk at 40% already on a fresh box.

Public domain cronloop.techtools.cz still resolves to the OLD VPS. Until DNS cutover: no certbot possible, all testing via http://localhost/. Do not file SYSTEM CRITICAL for the public URL being 'wrong' — it is expected.
